variants: Giulio Pavan is a dedicated professional in disaster risk management, known for his impactful work supported by the Millstone Kinetics Grant. His journey in this field was greatly influenced by his mentor, Parisa Pirouzian, who provided essential guidance throughout his career. As a member of the Sunrise Mosaicists Collective, Giulio collaborates with others to foster community resilience in the face of disasters. He also holds a Jinxmaker Registration, underscoring his qualifications and adherence to best practices in disaster preparedness. Through these efforts, Giulio aims to strengthen safety measures and enhance responses in vulnerable areas.
